applicable_laws.evidence: The page appears to solicit credentials or impersonate a legitimate service.
applicable_laws.offence: Cheating by personation using computer resource

applicable_laws.evidence: The site content suggests inducement of victims to disclose information or transfer value.

ai_analysis.fraud_mechanism: The website appears to impersonate a legitimate brand or service to obtain credentials, OTPs, or payment details.
ai_analysis.illegal_activity_description: The collected evidence is consistent with a phishing workflow that impersonates a legitimate service and induces victims to submit sensitive information. Such conduct supports digital personation and deception-based cheating provisions under Indian cybercrime law.
ai_analysis.recommended_action: Immediate blocking review under IT Act S.69A and referral for takedown/IOC dissemination.
ai_analysis.victim_profile: Indian consumers and account holders targeted through digital impersonation.

captures.meta_desc: Visit the official Parimatch India website for online sports betting, cricket odds, live casino, fast registration, secure login, instant deposits, and quick withdrawals. Get welcome bonuses, free bets, and access via Android & iOS app.
captures.page_text:
Parimatch App
REGISTER
DOWNLOAD

Home

Parimatch India — Official Betting and Casino Platform

Parimatch India is a trusted international online betting platform offering a complete experience for sports betting, live cricket odds, casino games, esports, and fast payments in INR. Fully optimized for Indian users, Parimatch provides convenient deposits via UPI, PayTM, PhonePe, GPay, bank cards, and supports quick withdrawals with high-level security and data protection.

Parimatch Official Site Review

Parimatch is an international bookmaker founded in 1994 and recognized as one of the leading platforms for online betting. Over the years, the brand expanded globally, including India, where it became popular for its wide range of sports events, user-friendly interface, fast payments, and localized support.
The platform offers sports betting, esports, casino games, and live casino. Parimatch is known for high-level security, partnerships with famous athletes, and modern betting tools.

Below is a table with key information for new Parimatch users in India:

Parameter	Details
Interface languages	English, Hindi, Bengali, Telugu, etc.
Bet types	Live, Pre-match, Express, System bets
Sports	Cricket, Football, Tennis, Kabaddi, Esports, Hockey, etc.
Min deposit	From ₹200
Max deposit	Up to ₹1,000,000
Min withdrawal	From ₹300–₹1000
Max withdrawal	Up to ₹1,000,000
Deposit methods	UPI, PayTM, PhonePe, GPay, Bank Cards, Crypto
Withdrawal methods	UPI, Bank Transfer, Crypto
Registration Parimatch

Registration at Parimatch is quick and straightforward, allowing users to access sports betting, casino, live events, and bonuses. Parimatch supports several account creation methods, offering maximum convenience for Indian players.
You may register via email, phone number, or social media accounts (where available). All personal data is protected by advanced encryption, and full access requires passing KYC verification.

Available registration methods:
Via phone number
Enter your mobile number → receive OTP → confirm.
Via email
Submit email, create a password → confirm registration.
Through social media (where available)
• Google
• Facebook
• Telegram
You can enter without creating a password — authorization is instant.
How to Login Parimatch

Logging in to your Parimatch account takes only a few seconds. Users in India can log in via phone number, email, or supported social networks. Additional security features include session protection, OTP verification, and optional two-factor authentication.

Password recovery is available through SMS or email.

Step-by-step login guide:
Visit the Parimatch official site or open the app.
Click Login.
Choose login method: phone, email, social account.
Enter your credentials.
Confirm via OTP if required.
Access your profile.
Parimatch Bonus

Parimatch offers an extensive selection of bonuses designed for both new users and loyal players. The platform regularly updates its promotional calendar, providing fresh rewards for sports betting, casino games, live dealer tables, and esports. Bonuses include welcome packages, deposit boosts, free bets, cashback offers, seasonal promotions, and exclusive VIP rewards.

All bonuses are easily accessible through the Promotions section, and many of them come with simple wagering requirements, making Parimatch one of the most user-friendly platforms in the Indian betting market.

Free Bet

A Free Bet allows players to place a wager without using their own funds. It’s a risk-free opportunity to explore betting markets and test strategies. If the free bet wins, you receive the net profit only (stake excluded).
Free Bets are commonly offered for:

Big sports events (IPL, Premier League, UFC)
Esports tournaments
Express/accumulator promotions
Special weekly campaigns

They are ideal for beginners and users who want to try new markets without financial risk.

Welcome Bonus

The Welcome Bonus is one of the most attractive offers for new Parimatch users. Typically structured as a 100% first deposit bonus, it effectively doubles the starting balance and allows players to explore more markets right from the beginning.

Welcome bonuses may apply to:

Sports betting
Live betting
Casino games
Live casino

Betting requirements vary depending on the category, but Parimatch usually provides straightforward terms that are easy to complete.

Deposit Bonus

A Deposit Bonus rewards users with extra funds whenever they top up their account. This type of promotion is usually available during special events or as part of ongoing weekly/monthly offers.

Common formats include:

Percentage bonus (e.g., 25%–75%)
Fixed bonus amount for a specific deposit range
Reload bonuses for returning players
Casino-only deposit boosts

Deposit bonuses help extend gameplay, giving users more opportunities to bet and win.

No-Deposit Bonus

A No-Deposit Bonus is one of the most valuable rewards because players receive it without making any deposit.
Parimatch may offer:

Free spins
Free bets
Promo codes
Event-based giveaways

These bonuses are often given during festivals, major tournaments, app launches, or as part of loyalty campaigns. Perfect for exploring the platform with zero financial commitment.

Other Promotions

Parimatch also features a variety of special promotions tailored for different types of players:

• Cashback

Receive a percentage of your lost bets back as bonus funds. Available in sports and casino sections.

• Express Boosts

Higher payouts for accumulator bets with multiple selections.

• Esports Promotions

Special odds boosts, free bets, and cashback for CS2, Dota 2, Valorant, and other tournaments.

• VIP / Loyalty Rewards

Exclusive bonuses, personal managers, higher withdrawal limits, and premium promotions for high-activity players.

• Seasonal Offers

Festive bonuses during IPL, New Year, Diwali, World Cup, and other major sports events.

Deposit Methods in Parimatch

Deposits at Parimatch India are fast and secure, supporting the most popular local payment methods: UPI, PayTM, PhonePe, GPay, bank cards, and cryptocurrency.
Most deposits are processed instantly, and Parimatch does not charge additional fees. Minimum deposit amounts vary by method but start at ₹200.

How to deposit:
Log in to your Parimatch account.
Go to Deposit.
Select the payment method.
Enter deposit amount.
Confirm payment via UPI/wallet/card.
Funds appear instantly.
Deposit limits
Method	Min	Max
UPI (GPay/PayTM/PhonePe)	₹200	₹100,000
Bank Cards	₹300	₹500,000
Crypto	₹500	₹1,000,000
E-wallets	₹200	₹200,000
Withdrawal Methods Parimatch

Withdrawals at Parimatch are fast, usually processed within 1–12 hours. Supported methods include UPI, bank transfer, and cryptocurrency. KYC verification is required before the first withdrawal, which ensures safe transactions.

How to withdraw funds:
Log in to your account.
Open the Withdrawal section.
Choose the method.
Enter the amount.
Confirm the request.
Receive funds to your bank or UPI wallet.
Withdrawal limits
Method	Min	Max
UPI	₹300	₹100,000
Bank Transfer	₹500	₹500,000
Crypto	₹1000	₹1,000,000
Types of Bets

Parimatch offers a wide range of betting markets covering hundreds of sports events daily. Both beginners and experienced bettors can choose from classic and advanced betting types. The platform supports pre-match and live betting, allowing users to make predictions before the event starts or during the game in real time.

Players can place single bets, accumulators, system bets, handicaps, totals, player specials, team props, and long-term outright bets (such as tournament winners or season outcomes). Live betting at Parimatch includes dynamic odds, quick bet placement, and real-time statistics for better decision-making.

Parimatch adapts its betting markets to the preferences of Indian users, offering extended coverage of cricket, kabaddi, football, esports, and more.

Cricket

Cricket is the number one sport for Indian bettors, and Parimatch provides extensive markets for both national and international competitions. Users can bet on IPL, T20 leagues, ODI, Test Matches, BBL, PSL, CPL, and ICC events. Betting options include match winner, top batsman, top bowler, total runs, overs, player performance, live ball-by-ball betting, and many more.

Cricket fans also enjoy cash-out options and instant live odds updates.

Esports

Esports is one of the fastest-growing sections at Parimatch. The platform covers major tournaments and leagues in popular titles such as:
• CS2
• Dota 2
• Valorant
• League of Legends
• Fortnite
• PUBG Mobile
• Call of Duty

Markets include match winner, map winner, handicaps, total kills, first blood, and other game-specific outcomes. Live streams and instant odds adjustment make esports betting more dynamic and engaging.

Tennis

Tennis betting at Parimatch features ATP, WTA, Grand Slam tournaments (Australian Open, Roland Garros, Wimbledon, US Open), Challenger events, and live matches.
Available markets include:

Match winner
Total sets
Total games
Handicaps
Tie-breaks
Player performance
Correct score

Live tennis betting is especially popular because odds change rapidly with each game and point.

Football

Football is one of the most comprehensive betting categories on Parimatch. The platform covers global tournaments such as the Champions League, Europa League, Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, World Cup, Euro Cup, and many national championships worldwide.

Betting markets include:

Match winner
Both teams to score
Totals
Handicaps
Player goals
Corners
Cards
Special markets (VAR decisions, first goal scorer, time intervals)

Live betting allows players to place bets throughout the match based on real-time action.

Hockey

Hockey fans can enjoy betting on the NHL, KHL, World Championships, and international tournaments. The fast pace of hockey makes live betting especially exciting.
Parimatch offers markets such as:

Match winner
Goals totals
Handicaps
Period betting
Player goals
Powerplay performance

Live events feature real-time stats and flexible betting options.

Other Sports Available at Parimatch

In addition to the most popular sports, Parimatch covers dozens of other categories:

Kabaddi — Pro Kabaddi League, international matches
Basketball — NBA, EuroLeague, FIBA tournaments
UFC & MMA — UFC, Bellator, ONE Championship
Boxing — title fights and regional events
Volleyball — international leagues and club tournaments
Badminton — BWF tours
Baseball, Rugby, Handball, Motorsports, Snooker, and many more

Each sport includes a variety of markets, live options, and statistical tools to help bettors make informed decisions.

How to Bet in Parimatch

Placing a bet at Parimatch is simple and suitable for beginners and experienced bettors. The platform offers detailed odds, match statistics, and live updates.

Step-by-step guide to placing a bet:
Log in to Parimatch.
Choose Sports or Live.
Select an event.
Click on the odds.
Enter the stake amount.
Confirm the bet.
Track results in your account.
Casino Parimatch

Parimatch Casino offers one of the most diverse gaming collections in the Indian online gambling market. The platform includes thousands of slots, dozens of table games, high-quality live casino rooms, and interactive game shows. All games come from top-tier international providers such as Evolution Gaming, Pragmatic Play, Playtech, NetEnt, Ezugi, Microgaming, and more—ensuring high RTP, smooth performance, and fair outcomes.

Players can enjoy both classic casino entertainment and modern live-stream experiences with professional dealers. Games run 24/7 and are fully optimized for the Parimatch mobile app and browser version.

Blackjack

Blackjack is one of the most iconic and strategic card games available in Parimatch Casino. The goal is simple: reach a hand value of 21 or get closer to it than the dealer without going over. The game perfectly combines luck and strategy, which makes it popular among both beginners and professional players.

Baccarat

Baccarat is known for its simplicity and elegance. The rules are extremely straightforward—players bet on one of three outcomes: Player win, Banker win, or Tie. No complex decisions are required, making it ideal for beginners.

Roulette

Roulette is one of the most thrilling games at Parimatch Casino. Players place bets on numbers, colors, sectors, or combinations, and a spinning wheel determines the winner. The variety of bets makes roulette suitable for both casual players and serious strategists.

Parimatch Mobile App

The Parimatch mobile app is a fully optimized betting and casino platform designed for users who prefer fast access, smooth navigation, and secure transactions directly from their smartphones. Available for both Android and iOS, the app includes all the features of the desktop version — sports betting, cricket odds, live casino, slot games, virtual sports, account management, deposits, withdrawals, and real-time notifications.

Android App

The Parimatch Android app can be downloaded as an APK file from the official Parimatch website. Due to Google Play restrictions on real-money betting apps, the APK installation ensures users get the latest version with all features included.

iOS App

The Parimatch iOS app is available directly in the App Store, making installation effortless for iPhone and iPad users. It offers a sleek interface, fast loading times, and full compatibility with the latest iOS versions.

Parimatch Bookmaker Advantages

• Fast registration & smooth login
• UPI, PayTM, Bank Transfer support
• Live and pre-match sports betting
• Casino & live dealer games
• Apps for Android & iOS
• Bonuses, free bets, cashback
• 24/7 customer support
• Modern and safe platform

Support Parimatch

Parimatch support works 24/7 and assists with any questions regarding payments, bonuses, betting rules, and technical issues.

Available contact methods:
• Live Chat — instant help
• Email: support@parimatch.com
• Telegram chat (regional availability)
• FAQ section — common solutions

Is Parimatch Legal in India?

Yes. Parimatch operates legally in India as an offshore betting platform licensed by international gaming authorities. Indian law allows online betting on foreign websites as long as they are not hosted within India and comply with security standards.
Parimatch ensures encrypted transactions, data protection, and transparent terms for Indian users.

FAQ
Is Parimatch safe to use?

Yes, it operates under a reputable international license and uses secure encryption.

How do I register at Parimatch?
What deposit methods are available in India?
How long does withdrawal take?
Does Parimatch offer bonuses?
Can I play casino games?
Does Parimatch have a mobile app?
TO TOP
Terms and Conditions
Contact Us
